title: yosys-abc: src/map/scl/sclLibUtil.c:77: void abc::Abc_SclHashCells(SC_Lib *): Assertion `*pPlace == -1' failed.
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.51 (git sha1 c4b519022, clang++ 18.1.3 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

untar and run https://drive.google.com/file/d/1teJ8WAzw8EU9B1FdBe42cxbNczJQhb3w/view?usp=sharing

```
$ ./run-me-ethmac-asap7-base.sh
[deleted]
BC: Library "asap7_merged" from "/home/oyvind/OpenROAD-flow-scripts/flow/designs/asap7/ethmac_lvt/foo/./designs/asap7/ethmac_lvt/objects/asap7/ethmac/base/lib/merged.lib" has 212 cells (46 skipped: 46 seq; 0 tri-state; 0 no func; 146 dont_use).  Time =     0.50 sec
ABC: Memory =  164.45 MB. Time =     0.50yosys-abc: src/map/scl/sclLibUtil.c:77: void abc::Abc_SclHashCells(SC_Lib *): Assertion `*pPlace == -1' failed.
ABC: Aborted (core dumped)
```


Originally encountered in https://github.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD-flow-scripts/pull/3020

### Expected Behavior

An actionable error message for what's wrong or that it works.

### Actual Behavior

assert()

ABC: Memory =  164.45 MB. Time =     0.50yosys-abc: src/map/scl/sclLibUtil.c:77: void abc::Abc_SclHashCells(SC_Lib *): Assertion `*pPlace == -1' failed.
